use_codes.desc: A PROCESS FOR TREATING A PATIENT SUFFERING FROM PARKINSON'S SYNDROME AND IN NEED OF TREATMENT

indications.text: REQUIP XL is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson’s disease.

1.1 Parkinson’s Disease
REQUIP XL® is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson’s disease.

1.1 Parkinson’s Disease
REQUIP XL® is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson’s disease.

• Hallucination may occur. (5.5)
REQUIP XL is an orally administered, non-ergoline dopamine agonist
• Dyskinesia may be caused or exacerbated. Decreasing the L-dopa dose
indicated for the treatment of signs and symptoms of idiopathic Parkinson’s
may lessen or eliminate this side effect. (5.6)
